name: Oysters Moskowitz
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain juices from salmon and set aside.
2. Mix shallots, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, and margarine in a skillet until well blended, 5 to 10 minutes.
3. Return salmon to the skillet and simmer until done, about 10 minutes.
4. Add bread crumbs and enough salmon liquid until moist but not loose.
5. Place in ramekins while hot and serve.
